Midnight Depths: Navy, cobalt, deep indigo with hints of silver—mysterious, serene, and profoundly calm.
Cerulean Dream: Bright cerulean, sky blue, seafoam white—refreshing, hopeful, and endlessly expansive.
Coral Sunrise: Coral pink, turquoise, golden yellow—vibrant, joyful, and warmly tropical.
Sunset Lagoon: Deep orange, amber, teal, rose gold—romantic, dreamy, and luminously warm.
Bioluminescent Abyss: Electric blue, neon green, violet on black—alien, mystical, and hauntingly beautiful.
Phosphorescent Night: Cyan glow, lime green, magenta, obsidian—otherworldly, energetic, and strikingly vivid.
Gothic Siren: Charcoal, blood red, bone white—dramatic, ominous, and darkly elegant.
Tarnished Rose: Deep burgundy, tarnished silver, ash gray, pearl—melancholic, vintage, and hauntingly sophisticated.
Arctic Whisper: Ice blue, pearl white, glacier cyan—pristine, peaceful, and crystalline.
Aurora Dreams: Aurora green, polar blue, iridescent white, mint—magical, celestial, and serenely northern.
Golden Hour Cove: Amber, honey, warm copper—glowing, nostalgic, and softly radiant.
Sunset Blush: Soft rose, peach, champagne gold, cream—tender, romantic, and warmly gentle.
Moonlit Tide: Silver, slate blue, pale lavender—ethereal, tranquil, and mysteriously nocturnal.
Spectral Shimmer: Ghostly white, pewter, periwinkle, shadow blue—haunting, delicate, and softly luminous.
Jeweled Crown: Emerald, sapphire, ruby, gold—opulent, regal, and luxuriously rich.
Amethyst Palace: Deep purple, sapphire blue, rose gold, champagne—majestic, elegant, and regally vibrant.
Storm Surge: Gunmetal gray, lightning white, deep teal—powerful, turbulent, and dramatically intense.
Tempest Foam: Charcoal, seafoam white, storm green, steel—fierce, wild, and electrically charged.
Pastel Reverie: Soft pink, baby blue, lavender mist—gentle, innocent, and dreamily peaceful.
Sea Glass Whisper: Seafoam green, pearl, pale aqua, blush—delicate, soothing, and softly translucent.
Abyssal Sapphire: Prussian blue, deep violet, black, silver sparkle—profound, enigmatic, and infinitely deep.
Tropical Paradise: Lime green, hot pink, sunny yellow, aquamarine—exuberant, playful, and brilliantly cheerful.
Crimson Depths: Deep red, maroon, bronze, black—intense, passionate, and darkly alluring.
Glacial Mint: Mint green, icy white, pale turquoise—crisp, fresh, and coolly invigorating.
Copper Sunset: Burnt orange, copper, mauve, warm sand—earthy, glowing, and richly atmospheric.
